title: nassella arcaensis
intro: Nassella arcaensis, also known as Arca needle grass, is a species of grass that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Nassella arcaensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. Nassella arcaensis can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
